sources.cleaned_content:
Menzerna Heavy Cut 1000 Compound 32oz

Brand: Menzerna
Regular price: $49.95 CAD
Barcode: 4260063010019
3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Product Image: //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/menzerna-1000-32oz_dbcf7d96-c864-4b79-a5f3-d0b19e293e4a.jpg?v=1633628538&width=1800

Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 1000 (HCC 1000) is a highly effective sanding polish for automotive clear coats. HCC 1000 removes overspray, severe signs of use and sanding marks effectively and reliably. Recommended Usage.

- Removes 1000~1500 grit sanding scratches
- Water based, silicone free
- Low dusting, easy clean up
- Safe on all types of paint
- Finishes nicely with little or no surface haze

How to use:
1. Clean surface thoroughly prior to polishing.
2. Shake the bottle prior to use and apply a small quantity of the product onto the polishing pad (a pea-sized drop is sufficient for an area measuring approx. 40 x 40 cm).
3. Use the Menzerna Heavy Cut Foam Pad in the event of heavy signs of use. If using a new or dry pad, apply sufficient polish to prevent the formation of noticeable holograms.
4. Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method. Apply light pressure at the start of the polishing process. Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine by 10%.
5. If working on very dry coatings, spray a little water onto the surface to prevent dust formation.
6. At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
7. Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with our Premium Microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.
8. Any signs of sanding and use have now been removed. For an exceptionally glossy finish, now apply a Menzerna Medium Cut and a Menzerna Finish Polish.

Available Size: 32 oz

Product Information:
- Excellent heavy cutting polish that removes noticeable swirls and ultra fine scratches
- Commonly used with a Lake Country Yellow Cutting Pad or a Lake Country Purple Foamed Wool Pad
- We recommend following up with a lighter pad and polish combination to restore a glossy finish
- Protect the paint after polishing with the Menzerna Power Lock!
- Product Code: M-1000Q

Customer Reviews: 84% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 19 ratings)

Product Description:
Heavy Cut Compound 1000 is a heavy cutting polish or compound that comes from Menzerna, which is one of the world's oldest and most distinguished polish manufacturers. This product was formerly known as the Menzerna Power Gloss but it still utilizes the same great formula but with an updated name and label. This heavy cutting polish is designed to help remove some of your worst surface imperfections so you can have the paint looking it's best again. Generic heavy cutting polishes use large polishing particles to get their cutting power that are loosely clustered. These larger particles almost certainly mean the clear coat will have more haze and marring which requires more polishing afterward to restore a transparent clearcoat. Menzerna uses a very different approach that gives you more cutting power and a fraction of the haze that generic compounds and heavy cutting polishes leave behind. Menzerna uses an ingenious method of using much smaller micro abrasive particles that are identical in size and densely clustered. Having all of these uniform micro abrasives tightly gathered gives you outstanding cutting power to remove deeper swirls, oxidation, light scratches and other surface imperfections. If your vehicle has noticeable surface imperfections and it needs to be restored to like new condition then the Heavy Cut Compound is the perfect product to start with. Whenever you use a heavy cutting polish we typically recommend you follow it up with lighter polish(s) to ensure there is no haze and the surface has optimal gloss. Use the Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound today and say good-bye to surface imperfections and hello to a deep shine.

To learn more about Menzerna Polishes and the 2015 label name change please see the Menzerna Polishing Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-Polishing-Chart/

Product Downloads:
- 2015 Menzerna Label Name Change Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna_2015_Label_Name_Change_Chart.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-2015-Polishing-Program.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Program: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Programme.pdf
- 2019 Menzerna Polishing Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Chart.pdf
- Menzerna Paint Defect Repair Product Range: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Paint-Defect-Repair-Product-Range.pdf
- Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Compounds-Chart.pdf

From The Label:
Rubbing Compound - Swiftly removes medium scratches and 1500 sand marks

Customer Reviews:

Review by Matthew H. (11/8/2022) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
There is no substitute for this heavy cut compound. I have tried many, including 3m products endorsed by body shops, and this does a job I haven't gotten from the others. My greatest triumph with this has been on gelcoat, where it has saved me an entire polishing stage by not only cutting through heavy oxidation on a 38' boat in rough shape, but finishing well enough to do just 1 additional stage of polishing to get a high gloss result. It saved me at least 6-8 hours of heavy work on a big job I had almost no help with. Boat guys swear by 3m super cut, but but this stuff cut that oxidation just as quick, and finished much much better. When it comes to cars, it will get the job done as well, I use it on keying scratches, bumper scrapes, and headlight restoration to name a few tough jobs. Stop looking for a compound and get this stuff, you won't regret it.

Review by Armand H. (2/10/2014) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
I use this with an orange pad and it most certainly will take care of your more obvious scratches and can remove the haziness and rough spots off of finish quickly.

Review by wesley p. (2/18/2013) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
Power Gloss Compound is something I use for problem scratches that haven't gone through the clear coat. I also find it valuable when I have to polish by hand areas such as under door handles etc. I use the purple wool pad with this product followed by FF3000 or finer.

Description:
Menzerna's heavy cutting power removes scratches, overspray and severe signs of use quickly and thoroughly at the best value. Heavy Cut Compound (HCC) 1000, formerly known as Power Gloss 1000 (PG 1000) and S34A, reliably removes sanding marks from 1,500 to 2,000 grit.

Benefits:
- Quick removal of sanding marks
- Uniform sanding pattern
- High productivity
- No dust formation
- Silicone-free

For ideal polishing conditions after rough sanding, look no further than Menzerna Heavy Cut Classic and High Performance Polishing Compounds. Scratches, overspray and severe signs of use are removed quickly, reliably and thoroughly, while innovative, highly abrasive one-step products with the latest polishing technology complete the heavy-cut segment. Professional automotive coatings based on industrial process standards maximize efficiency!

Menzerna's heavy cut powerhouse eliminates scratches, over-spray and pronounced signs of use quickly and thoroughly at the best price-performance ratio. Heavy Cut Compound (HCC) 1000, formerly known as Power Gloss 1000 (PG 1000) and S34A, reliably removes 1500 to 2000 grit sanding marks.

Regular price: $49.99 CAD
Volume Size: 1L

Product details:
- Type: Automotive Polishing Compounds
- Vendor: Menzerna Polishing Compounds
- Origin: Germany
- Volume: 1L
- Purpose: Single Stage Compound
- Abrasion: 1500 Grit (Wool) and 2000 Grit (Foam)
- Cut / Gloss: 9 / 3

Description:
Menzerna's foam pad car polish for the fast and efficient removal of sanding marks from automotive clear coats.

Menzerna's heavy cut powerhouse eliminates scratches, over-spray and pronounced signs of use quickly and thoroughly at the best price-performance ratio. Heavy Cut Compound (HCC) 1000, formerly known as Power Gloss 1000 (PG 1000) and S34A, reliably removes 1500 to 2000 grit sanding marks.

Cut / Gloss: 9 / 3

Benefits:
- Fast removal of sanding marks
- Even sanding pattern
- High productivity
- No dust Formation
- Silicone-free

For ideal polishing conditions after rough grinding, look no further than the classic, high-performance Menzerna heavy cut car polishing pastes. Scratches, overspray and severe signs of use are removed quickly, reliably, and thoroughly, while innovative and highly abrasive one-step products with the latest polishing technology complete the heavy cut segment. Professional automotive polishes based on industrial process standards maximize efficiency!

Recommendations:
Pairs with: Menzerna Heavy Cut Foam Pad
Suitable for: Rotary application.
Alternative Products: Menzerna SHCC 300, Menzerna SHCC 300 (Green Line), Menzerna Cut Force Pro, Menzerna HCC 400, Menzerna HCC 400 (Green Line)

Storage: Store between 5C and 30C, avoid frost/freezing and direct sunlight.

Precautions: Contains petroleum distillates, hydrocarbons, and alcohols; wear appropriate safety clothing and respiratory protection if work area is not well ventilated. Can cause serious eye irritation if directly exposed. Keep in mind that polishing automotive paint necessarily removes small amounts of material from your clear coat. Menzerna paint polishes are professional products capable of removing significant amounts of surface material; misuse could lead to burnt paint or you polishing entirely through your clear coat. Use your least aggressive polishes, pads, and machines first unless you are very familiar with your work surface, tools, and these products.

Technical data sheet: https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_05_HCC1000_EN_09.2021.pdf

Brand:
Menzerna has developed polishing compounds for over 135 years and is the largest manufacturer of solid compounds globally; they also produce automotive polishing compounds, gelcoat polishing compounds, and other chemicals to aid in refinishing and protecting coated surfaces.
